summary: Resume Archive Game playback in the Today's Lineup carousel
description:
GIVEN a user who is entitled for Archive game playback is logged in

AND the user is on the Games page

AND the user selects an Archive game for playback from the Games page

AND the user exits Archive game playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the same Archive game from the Today’s Lineup carousel

AND selects the same team feed for Resume playback
steps.result:
THEN the Home page is dismissed

AND the video player displays full screen

AND playback starts successfully from the resumed point
